#!/usr/bin/env python3
import urllib.request
import urllib.error
import base64
import subprocess

url = "http://the-agent-company.com:8092/remote.php/dav/files/theagentcompany/Documents/command.txt"
username = "theagentcompany"
password = "theagentcompany"
credentials = base64.b64encode(f"{username}:{password}".encode()).decode()

req = urllib.request.Request(url)
req.add_header("Authorization", f"Basic {credentials}")

try:
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10) as response:
        content = response.read().decode('utf-8')
        print("FILE CONTENT:")
        print(content)
        with open("/tmp/command.txt", "w") as f:
            f.write(content)
        print("Saved to /tmp/command.txt")
        print("\nRunning command...")
        result = subprocess.run(content.strip(), shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True)
        print("STDOUT:", result.stdout)
        print("STDERR:", result.stderr)
        print("Return code:", result.returncode)
except Exception as e:
    print(f"Error: {e}")

#!/usr/bin/env python3
import urllib.request
import base64
import subprocess

url = "http://the-agent-company.com:8092/remote.php/dav/files/theagentcompany/Documents/command.txt"
credentials = base64.b64encode(b"theagentcompany:theagentcompany").decode("utf-8")

req = urllib.request.Request(url)
req.add_header("Authorization", f"Basic {credentials}")

with urllib.request.urlopen(req) as response:
    content = response.read().decode("utf-8")

print("=== command.txt contents ===")
print(content)
print("=== end of file ===")

# Now execute the command found in the file
print("\n=== Executing the command ===")
result = subprocess.run(content.strip(), shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True)
print("STDOUT:", result.stdout)
print("STDERR:", result.stderr)
print("Return code:", result.returncode)
